creator: thomas.schmucker@gmx.net
text:
Hi there.

It seems that the contents of the newest package of "comms/chirp" is incomplete and some files are missing. When i execute `pkg info -l chirp-py39-20240120` the following output is generated:

---
chirp-py39-20240120:
        /usr/local/share/licenses/chirp-py39-20240120/GPLv3
        /usr/local/share/licenses/chirp-py39-20240120/LICENSE
        /usr/local/share/licenses/chirp-py39-20240120/catalog.mk
---

In addition, the file size of the package is much smaller compared to the previous version:

ls -l /var/cache/pkg/chirp-py39-*.pkg
[...]
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  1610464 14 Jan. 14:02 /var/cache/pkg/chirp-py39-20230731_1~80fd2a3716.pkg
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel    12648 26 Feb. 10:02 /var/cache/pkg/chirp-py39-20240120~119837e8a8.pkg
[...]

It would be really great if someone could take care of the problem. Thank you very much.
